generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor deployed in building infrastructure to detect occupancy patterns for adaptive control systems. Integrated with BIM for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor measuring lighting levels for visual comfort optimization and reinforcement learning-based control policies in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature and humidity for HVAC system optimization and energy consumption forecasting."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meter sensor tracking real-time energy consumption metrics for predictive analytics and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance LEDDriverActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator receiving control signals from Digital Twin to dynamically adjust LED lighting conditions based on occupancy and reinforcement learning policies."
]

instance HVACUnitActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building HVAC unit actuator controlled via Digital Twin for adaptive temperature and humidity regulation based on real-time sensor data."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancyPatternData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime occupancy pattern data collected from occupancy sensors, used for adaptive control policy optimization and space utilization analytics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoFramework, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level measurements used for visual comfort assessment and reinforcement learning-based lighting control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoFramework, VisualizationModel
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity data processed for HVAC system optimization and energy consumption forecasting models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationModel, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics used for predictive analytics, optimization recommendations, and lifecycle management."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationModel, FacilityManagementDashboard
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone BIM model enriched with device metadata including sensor/actuator configurations and control logic for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance BIMDeviceMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated runtime device management model from BIM containing sensor/actuator configurations and tenant IDs for Eclipse Ditto integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoFramework, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies for adaptive lighting control as implemented in BOREALIS project, integrated with physical actuators."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoFramework, VisualizationModel
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics simulation model for energy consumption forecasting and building performance optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for interactive monitoring of building systems and real-time data visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization, FacilityManagementDashboard
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time data exchange and device management between physical sensors/actuators and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:hasInput BIMModel
]

instance EclipseDittoFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework providing bidirectional communication and runtime configuration for device management in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:hasInput BIMDeviceMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform enabling immersive 3D visualization and interactive monitoring of building systems through the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:hasInput VisualizationModel
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework implemented in BOREALIS project for optimizing adaptive lighting control policies based on sensor feedback."
    DTDFVocab:hasInput ControlLogicModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time operational metrics visualization through Unreal Engine for facility managers and operators."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeOperationalMetricsInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service deploying reinforcement learning-based control logic for adaptive lighting and HVAC systems optimization."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingPolicyAction, HVACOptimizationAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering energy consumption forecasting and predictive maintenance alerts based on simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight, MaintenanceAlertInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling 3D interactive monitoring of building systems through Unreal Engine visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingSystemVisualizationInsight
]

instance FacilityManagementDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing stakeholder dashboards for monitoring and controlling building systems with real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:enables FacilityManagementInsight, ControlRecommendationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeOperationalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational metrics including energy consumption and occupancy trends displayed through visualization services."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of LED lighting conditions based on reinforcement learning policies and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC system regulation based on environmental condition data and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output forecasting future energy consumption patterns for optimization recommendations."
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts identifying potential sensor failures or equipment degradation based on runtime data."
]

instance BuildingSystemVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of building systems enabling immersive monitoring and interaction through Unreal Engine."
]

instance FacilityManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Stakeholder dashboard providing comprehensive building system monitoring capabilities for facility managers."
]

instance ControlRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for adaptive lighting policies and energy-saving measures based on post-occupancy analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PostOccupancyLearningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning insights refining control policies based on post-occupancy sensor feedback and operational data."
]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all sensors, actuators, and control systems integrated with the Digital Twin."
    base:contains OccupancySensor, LightSensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
                 LEDDriverActuator, HVACUnitActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical Digital Twin environment integrating all models, services, and enablers for building lifecycle management."
    base:contains BIMModel, BIMDeviceMetadataModel, ControlLogicModel, SimulationModel,
                 VisualizationModel, EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoFramework,
                 UnrealEngineVisualization, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

// C1: System Under Study
instance BuildingDigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "BIM-based Digital Twin for building infrastructure focusing on real-time synchronization between physical assets and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment, DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals generated by the DT** and transmitted back to physical actuators (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) through the Ditto middleware. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing the DT to dynamically adjust control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) based on real-time data. This bidirectional flow is enabled by **standardized extension points** in the DT architecture, ensuring seamless integration with physical control systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates on a **real-time, low-latency basis**, with synchronization intervals aligned to operational requirements of Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework ensures **millisecond-to-second-level updates** for critical control loops (e.g., lighting adjustments) and **minute-to-hourly updates** for broader analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends). Eclipse Hono and Ditto facilitate near-instantaneous bidirectional communication, while Unreal Engine provides interactive visualization with minimal delay."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   1. **BIM Core**: The semantic foundation for building data.
   2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
   3. **Control Layer**: Device modeling and runtime logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies).
   4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine for interactive 3D monitoring.
   5. **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for custom services (e.g., IoT analytics, facility management tools).
   The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across heterogeneous infrastructure systems via **modular service integration**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building, from **design (as-designed)** to **construction (as-manufactured)** and **operation (as-operated)**. During design, the DT leverages BIM models for **pre-commissioning simulations**. In construction, it supports **device modeling and commissioning**. During operation, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, control, and optimization** (e.g., adaptive lighting via BOREALIS). The framework also supports **post-occupancy adjustments** to refine control policies dynamically."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Evaluates the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart in the **Living Lab case study**.
   - **Continuous synchronization**: Real-time data exchange maintains model coherence with operational changes.
   - **Verification mechanisms**: Automated validation of BIM models before deployment (implied by the mention of model scanning and metadata extraction).
   The framework does not explicitly detail **uncertainty quantification** or **clash detection** beyond general BIM capabilities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange, but specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, RESTful APIs) are not mentioned. The middleware facilitates **bidirectional communication** between physical sensors/actuators and the DT, ensuring low-latency synchronization. The document does not specify encryption (e.g., TLS) or IoT gateway details."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with no explicit mention of hosting models (e.g., on-premise, cloud, hybrid). The framework supports **runtime deployment** of DT artifacts generated from BIM models, but specifics like Kubernetes clusters, GPU servers, or databases (e.g., InfluxDB) are absent."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through **standardized extension points** and interoperability with **heterogeneous AECO systems**. The framework supports integration with **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and **sensor networks**, but specific protocols (e.g., OPC UA, BACnet) or external systems (e.g., ERP, city-scale DTs) are not mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, but does not explicitly reference specific standards like **IFC, IoT-DM, or MOF**. The document emphasizes **standardized integration frameworks** and **modular service-oriented architectures** for interoperability."
]
